HGSS.090.0000:
I’m waiting to see SLOWPOKE’s moment
of evolution. Through observation,\r
I made a new discovery.\f
A SLOWPOKE with a King’s Rock often
gets bitten by a SHELLDER.\f
Here, I’ll share a King’s Rock with you.
HGSS.090.0002:
I’m going to be like SLOWPOKE.\f
I’ll wait patiently so I can see
one evolve.
